markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Gather feedback on the Auth0 experiment, specifically focusing on the use of Gemini AI for account research and outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The AI tool is significantly accelerating workflow, reducing account research time from 1-2 hours to about 10 minutes](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Gemini enables much more specific and targeted messaging compared to previous broad-brush approaches](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Some technical issues with file permissions and Gemini's occasional inaccuracies need addressing](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [The experiment shows promise in making SDRs more efficient, but refinements are needed for wider adoption](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

## Topics

### Sentiment and Time Savings

  - [Nick reported overall positive sentiment, calling the tool a "huge value add"](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Time savings: 1-2 hours reduced to \~10 minutes per account for research](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Enables much more specific messaging than previous approaches (20 accounts with single message vs. tailored messages)](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)

### Gemini Usage and Workflow

  - [Standard prompt: "Help me break into X account"](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [AI provides account qualification, key signals (e.g., data breaches, digital transformation)](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Identifies relevant personas to target](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [Generates email content based on provided prompts](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [15-step sequence built into the outreach platform](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)

### Technical Challenges

  - [File permission issues when accessing shared folders](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Gemini occasionally down or slow to respond](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Limited to 10 documents per "gem" (AI workspace)](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [Uncertainty about folder vs. individual file usage in gems](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)

### AI Output Quality

  - [Generally good, but occasional inaccuracies (e.g., incorrectly stating a company was non-operational)](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Sometimes produces similar subject lines across multiple emails to same company](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [May reference outdated information (e.g., congratulating on year-old promotions)](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### Improvement Suggestions

  - [Provide justification for accounts not selected for the program](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Implement better prompts and templates for consistency](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Consider restructuring workflow (e.g., one gem per account vs. shared gem)](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Add ability to validate AI-provided information](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)

### Scaling Considerations

  - [Need to simplify process for multiple SDRs](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Potential resistance to processing time from some users](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Importance of maintaining personalization while increasing efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Investigate and resolve file permission issues in shared folders](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Develop template prompts and instructions to streamline usage](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Explore restructuring of gem usage (e.g., one gem per account vs. shared gem)](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Address AI accuracy issues, particularly around company status and personal info](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Gather feedback from wider SDR group as they begin using the tool](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=1858.0)
  - [Continue to monitor and report on both successes and challenges in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/aAo-JZ-xncc9kDzSxsz2z5-VJaRAyy2X?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
